scripts.setup:api: sh -c 'if [ ! -x ./venv/bin/pip ]; then python3 -m venv venv; fi && ./venv/bin/pip install -U pip && ./venv/bin/pip install -r server_requirements.txt'
scripts.dev:api: sh -c 'if [ ! -x ./venv/bin/python ]; then echo "" >&2; echo "  [api] No Python venv at ./venv. Run:  npm run setup:api" >&2; echo "" >&2; exit 1; fi; ./venv/bin/python -c "import fastapi" 2>/dev/null || { echo "" >&2; echo "  [api] FastAPI missing in ./venv. Run:  npm run setup:api" >&2; echo "" >&2; exit 1; }; exec ./venv/bin/python server_main.py'
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev" "npm run dev:api"
